message:
feat(notify): add file inbox and advanced routing (ntm-twff)

Add Human Notification Routing with:
- FileBox channel for offline human review (.ntm/human_inbox/)
- Primary/fallback channel configuration
- Per-event-type routing rules
- Environment variable expansion for URLs, headers, paths
- Channel constants (Desktop, Webhook, Shell, Log, FileBox)

Tests pass (11 tests covering FileBox, Routing, PrimaryFallback, EnvVarExpansion).
